title: Rich Polish Kielbasa Stew
description: Jammy, pillowy stew cooked in a ttukbaegi, featuring pescatarian-friendly smoked trout sausage and vegetables for a date-night Polish comfort dish.
instructions: Slice the smoked trout sausage into 1-2 inch rounds.
Dice the onion, carrot, celery, and red bell pepper.
Heat 2 tbsp oil in the ttukbaegi over medium heat and sauté the sausage slices until lightly browned, then set aside.
Add the diced onion, carrot, celery, and bell pepper to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and smoked paprika, browning for 2 minutes.
Pour in the tomato puree and vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Return the sausage to the pot, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered for 20 minutes to meld flavors.
Stir in the fresh dill, season with salt and pepper, and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve hot, spooning stew into bowls and garnish with extra dill if desired.
